$comment: New-code diff-coverage floor (#1548). The gate (scripts/check-diff-coverage.ts) intersects `git diff --unified=0 <base>` with the v8 coverage report and fails a PR whose *added/modified* lines fall below this floor. Untouched legacy code is never measured. Like the arch-invariants ratchet: start modest, tighten over time — only raise, never lower without a justification + issue.
comment_minChangedLines: Diffs touching fewer than this many measurable new lines are exempt — a 1-line fix shouldn't need its own test to keep the percentage out of the 0%/100% noise floor.
